overall.description: A video game character in a yellow and black wingsuit flies through a deep river canyon, deploying a parachute near the end to descend toward the canyon wall. The footage features third-person perspective following the character through the rocky terrain with a river flowing below.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep river canyon with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: flying through the canyon in a wingsuit, maintaining steady glide above the river with arms outstretched

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall with layered sedimentary rock formations
steep rocky canyon wall casting deep shadows
dark water flowing through the canyon bottom far below
distant snow-covered mountain peak visible at the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The character glides through a deep river canyon in a wingsuit, with steep rocky walls rising on both sides and a distant snow-capped peak visible ahead. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character maintains steady flight above the dark river waters below, navigating the narrow canyon passage.

events.description: character deploys parachute and transitions from high-speed wingsuit glide to slow parachute descent

agents.ego_description: descending under parachute toward the canyon wall, preparing for landing on the rocky terrain

entered.detail: yellow and white parachute canopy deployed above the character with visible suspension lines

segments.scene_description: The character deploys a yellow parachute and begins descending toward the canyon floor, with the canopy filling the upper frame. The steep canyon walls rise closer on the left as the character approaches a landing zone among sparse vegetation and rocky terrain, with the river now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a high-speed glide through a deep river canyon to a controlled descent toward the rocky canyon floor. It begins with the character soaring in a wingsuit between steep rocky walls, moving steadily above dark river waters toward a distant snow-capped peak. As the character deploys a yellow parachute, the camera shifts its perspective to include the canopy filling the upper frame while the flight path begins to drop. The scene then closes in as the steep walls rise closer on the left and the river shifts to the right, finally guiding the character down toward a landing zone of sparse vegetation and rugged terrain.
